summary: Weekly recap video from the DHS Secretary that mixes selfie-to-camera narration with location footage. One shot is an aerial point-of-view from a helicopter looking down at a crew member wearing a blue 'USCG' flight helmet over a coastline. Burned-in caption subtitles appear (for example 'THEY HAVE A 90%'). The audio is him recapping the week, including a North Carolina hurricane recovery visit and a stop at Coast Guard training facilities.

script.scene: Aerial point-of-view from a helicopter over a coastline, a crew member in a blue 'USCG' flight helmet in the foreground; caption 'THEY HAVE A 90%.'
